hero.title: Where the desert meets the ocean
hero.subtitle: Experience authentic Amazigh adventures: Cooking classes, Quad, Buggy, Horse & Camel riding in Agadir.

services.title: Choose Your Experience
services.subtitle: From cooking classes to thrilling dune adventures — find your perfect Amazigh experience.
services.cooking_desc: From market to table: Learn to prepare authentic Tagine or Couscous with our expert chef.
services.quad_desc: 2 hours of pure adrenaline across the golden desert dunes. Transport included.
services.buggy_desc: 2-hour thrilling adventure in modern buggys through spectacular desert trails.
services.horse_desc: Magical 2-hour journey through Aghroud forests and Souss River with mint tea.
services.camel_desc: Traditional 2-hour desert experience through breathtaking dunes and forests.

trips.title: Discover Your Next Adventure
trips.subtitle: Handpicked experiences designed to inspire. From desert dunes to cultural immersion.

stats.title: Our Impact in Numbers
stats.subtitle: Every number tells a story of adventure

timeline.title: The Road to Adventure
timeline.subtitle: Each step brings you closer to the experience of a lifetime.
timeline.step1_desc: Meet us at Agadir Berbère Expérience. Meet your guide and prepare for the adventure ahead.
timeline.step2_desc: Select from our range of authentic experiences: cooking classes, quad biking, buggy rides, horse or camel trekking.
timeline.step3_desc: Explore the stunning landscapes of Agadir, from golden dunes to the scenic Aghroud forests and Souss River.
timeline.step4_desc: Experience authentic Amazigh hospitality with traditional mint tea and sweets at Kasbat Souss Artisan Complex.
timeline.step5_desc: Journey back with unforgettable memories and the promise of returning for more adventures.

gallery.title: Our Gallery
gallery.subtitle: A visual journey through our most memorable adventures

footer.description: Authentic Amazigh adventures in Agadir with professional guides. Cooking classes, Quad, Buggy, Horse & Camel rides.
footer.terms_body: These Terms of Service govern your use of the Agadir Berbère Expérience website and services. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms. All content, including images, text, and branding, is the property of Agadir Berbère Expérience. You may not reproduce, distribute, or modify any content without prior written consent. We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
footer.privacy_body: Agadir Berbère Expérience respects your privacy. We collect only the personal information you voluntarily provide, such as your name, email address, and phone number, for the purpose of responding to inquiries and booking requests. We do not sell, trade, or share your personal data with third parties except as required by law. We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information. By using our website, you consent to the collection and use of your information as described in this policy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out and let's plan your next Amazigh adventure.
